reasoning_content:
We need to check if 8927 is prime. Quick sanity check: check divisibility by small primes.

First, note: 8927 is odd, not divisible by 2. Sum of digits: 8+9+2+7=26, not divisible by 3, so not divisible by 3. Last digit not 0 or 5, so not divisible by 5. Check 7: 7*1275=8925, remainder 2, so not divisible by 7. Check 11: alternating sum: (8+2) - (9+7) = 10 - 16 = -6, not divisible by 11. Check 13: 13*686=8918, remainder 9; 13*687=8931, too high; so not. Check 17: 17*525=8925, remainder 2; not. Check 19: 19*470=8930, too high; 19*469=8911, remainder 16; not. Check 23: 23*388=8924, remainder 3; not. Check 29: 29*307=8903, remainder 24; 29*308=8932, too high; not. Check 31: 31*288=8928, too high; 31*287=8897, remainder 30; so not. Check 37: 37*241=8917, remainder 10; 37*242=8954, too high; not. Check 41: 41*217=8897, remainder 30; 41*218=8938; not. Check 43: 43*207=8901, remainder 26; 43*208=8944; not. Check 47: 47*190=8930, remainder -3; 47*189=8883, remainder 44; not. Check 53: 53*168=8904, remainder 23; 53*169=8957; not. Check 59: 59*151=8909, remainder 18; 59*152=8968; not. Check 61: 61*146=8906, remainder 21; 61*147=8967; not. Check 67: 67*133=8911, remainder 16; 67*134=8978; not. Check 71: 71*125=8875, remainder 52; 71*126=8946; not. Check 73: 73*122=8906, remainder 21; 73*123=8979; not. Check 79: 79*113=8927 exactly? 79*100=7900, 79*13=1027, sum=8927. Yes! 79*113 = 8927. So 8927 is composite (79 * 113). So it's not prime.

Thus answer: not prime.
